channel.title: Error when running npx frontity create
channel.description:
Hi, I get this error when I run npx frontity create
npx: installed 147 in 16.426s ⨯ Unable to compile TypeScript: error TS5023: Unknown compiler option 'esModuleInterop'.error TS5023: Unknown compiler option 'resolveJsonModule'.
I'm running npm/x - 6.11.2, node -11.2.0 typescript 3.5.3
I'd be grateful for any help,
Many thanks, Stephen

item.title: Error when running npx frontity create
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Oh, I see, thanks for the answer.

You may want to fix that, I don’t think running npm installs as sudo is a good idea.

You can look into nvm which makes node local to your home folder and also simplifies node and npm updates.

GitHub

nvm-sh/nvm

Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions - nvm-sh/nvm

Read full topic
item.source: Error when running npx frontity create

item.title: Error when running npx frontity create
item.dc:creator: stephenh1988
item.description:
Hi @luisherranz thanks for replying. I was just running npx frontity create in a clean directory.

I finally resolved this by running the command as sudo - presumably, I’ve installed npm as root and somewhere down the dependency tree its meeting a permissions error which for some reason bubbles up as an ‘unknown compiler option’

Read full topic
item.source: Error when running npx frontity create

item.title: Error when running npx frontity create
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Hey @stephenh1988, welcome to the community

stephenh1988:

error TS5023: Unknown compiler option ‘esModuleInterop’.error TS5023: Unknown compiler option ‘resolveJsonModule’.

This problem is usually because the "resolveJsonModule" option of the tsconfig.json file is missing or false. But Frontity uses an internal tsconfig.json with everything configured properly, so I wonder why is failing in your computer.

Are you trying to install Frontity in a folder that already contains a package.json with a tsconfig.json file? Or what is exactly your setup?

Read full topic
item.source: Error when running npx frontity create

item.title: Error when running npx frontity create
item.dc:creator: stephenh1988
item.description:
Hi,
I get this error when I run npx frontity create

npx: installed 147 in 16.426s
⨯ Unable to compile TypeScript:
error TS5023: Unknown compiler option ‘esModuleInterop’.error TS5023: Unknown compiler option ‘resolveJsonModule’.

I’m running
npm/x - 6.11.2,
node -11.2.0
typescript 3.5.3

I’d be grateful for any help,

Many thanks,
Stephen

Read full topic
